productDisplayName: Kiara Women Sporty Look Grey Handbag
description: A practical and stylish choice of bag in silver grey from kiara.  Extra roomy and comfortable to carry, the high shine fabric and smart shape will coordinate with any outfitHeight: 26cmWidth: 33cmDepth: 7cmMade of strong synthetic fabric for durabilityHas one main zipped compartment, large enough for a slim laptop, with internal mesh pocketsTwo short handles attached to the bag, alternate long strap providedTwo zipped pockets and velcro fastened flap on both back and front with multi organiser compartmentsPlastic zip pulls for style and ease of useCareWipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dust
